blocking_items: Supabase Auth leaked password protection is documented but not externally verified for production.
Production SQL backup plan exists, but no real production backup evidence is present.
Production revert plan exists, but no restore/revert drill evidence is present.
Vercel Production env values are not verified as production-ready.
PayPal live credentials, webhook id, production webhook URL, signature validation and live controlled subscription are not verified.
Google OAuth production client and redirect URIs are not verified.
PostCSS audit finding was resolved with a safe npm override; review the override during the next Expo major upgrade.
non_blocking_items: Vercel Preview is Ready and protected by expected public 401.
PayPal sandbox remains ready and documented with redacted bypass.
RLS passes through Supabase Session Pooler.
High npm audit finding in fast-xml-builder was resolved without force.
